name: NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc.
business: NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc. is a commercial mortgage REIT that originates, structures, and invests in first-lien mortgage loans, mezzanine loans, preferred equity, common equity, and multifamily and single-family rental CMBS securitizations. It targets real estate sectors including multifamily, single-family rental, self-storage, industrial, and life science in the top 50 U.S. metropolitan statistical areas. The company aims to generate attractive risk-adjusted returns through interest income, dividends, and capital appreciation.

exposures.sentence: We primarily focus on investments in real estate sectors where our senior management team has operating expertise, including in the multifamily, SFR, self-storage, industrial and life science sectors predominantly in the top 50 metropolitan statistical areas (MSAs).

catalysts.sentence: The Management Agreement was renewed on February 6, 2026 for a one-year term and is automatically renewed for successive one-year terms thereafter unless earlier terminated.
